R0254.title: Supplier Remote Access Abuse
R0254.definition: Third-party supplier remote-maintenance accounts, VPNs, or tools are stolen and used to enter enterprise environments.
R0254.description: Third-party supplier remote-maintenance accounts, VPNs, or tools are stolen and used to enter enterprise environments.
R0254.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
